title: Simple Emotes
description: With this mod you can do emote animations anywhere you want.
body:
With this mod you can do emote animations anywhere you want.


By default the animations are not set to any key so you have to manually set it.

This is so you only bound keys in the key bind settings to animations you want to use.

 

Animations are run once after the key is pressed.

Emotes can be used while walking but some can be canceled while sneaking.

This is based on what body part the animation is using.

For example the cheering and laughing animation gets canceled when sneaking.

And only one animation can be used at a time.

 

Works in multiplayer. (Server needs the mod too!)

 

Mod Currently Supports:

**Forge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1 | 1.19.2 | 1.18.2**

**Fabric 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**NeoForge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6**
 

SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE
